name: Franklin Templeton Digital Holdings Trust
summary: PART I DESCRIPTION OF THE TRUST The Franklin Templeton Digital Holdings Trust (the Trust) was formed as a Delaware statutory trust on September 6, 2023, and is governed by the provisions of an Agreement and Declaration of Trust dated as of January 5, 2024. The Trust currently offers a single series, the Franklin Bitcoin ETF (the Fund). The Fund issues common units of beneficial interest (Shares), which represent units of fractional undivided beneficial interest in and ownership of the Fund. The ...
